title: orthochilus aculeatus
intro: Orthochilus aculeatus, also known as the thorny lip orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orthochilus aculeatus include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in water, and it can also be used as a decoction or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
